title: Novi Sad, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Novi Sad, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Novi Sad is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 341,000. Serbia’s second-largest city, a cultural hub on the Danube known for the EXIT festival, Petrovaradin Fortress, and its charming old town.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
